title: Yggdrasil SMP
description: Join our Minecraft server to play with us and enjoy the broad landscape of custom generated world with tons of mods to experience!
body:
![Yggdrasil SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e94de342ea97cc7918e24e812c100d7656988306.png)

_Yggdrasil SMP is an adventurous modpack made for people with diverse interests. You want more enchantments? Exploration? Food? Bosses? A variety of blocks for your inner builder? We got it all!_

## **FEATURES:**

**❊ Compatible with some Shaders**

**❊ Unique Biomes** - Terralith, BetterNether, BetterEnd, etc.

**❊ New Types of Structures** - Towns & Towers, ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Villages, Repurposed Structures

**❊ Quality of Life** - Quartz Elevator, Reinforced Chests & Shulker Boxes, Traveler's Backpack

**❊ More Challenging Bosses** - Bosses of Mass Destruction

**❊ Decorations & Building Blocks** - Beautify: Refabricated, Plushie Mod, Macaws Mods, etc.

**❊ 75+ Mods**

## RAM Requirement:

Recommended dedicated RAM is 4GB or more
